policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-adb-r03 - Enforce Azure Databricks workspaces to use virtual network injection'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Databricks#IncidentremediationDatabricks#drcp-adb-r03 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Databricks should have virtual network injection
policyDefinition.description: This policy enforces injecting Azure Databricks in a virtual network, unlocking advanced networking and security features and providing greater control over network security configurations.

drcp.name: DatabricksVirtualNetworkInjection
drcp.controlDesc: Enforce Azure Databricks workspaces to use virtual network injection

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
